EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IDataMessage

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to methods and properties used to manage data messages.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CC018A04-24FB-11D4-B34C-00104BA2ABCC")]
public interface IDataMessage

Properties

ArgumentCount

Number of arguments in the data message.

int ArgumentCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ColumnCount

Number of columns in data message.

int ColumnCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreationDate

Indicates date of data message's creation.

object CreationDate { get; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataDefinitionID

ID value for the data definition in the message.

string DataDefinitionID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Destination

Indicates destination of the data message.

string Destination { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ID

ID value for the data message.

string ID { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MessageType

Indicates type of data message.

enumMessageType MessageType { get; }

Property Value

enumMessageType

Examples

Sample Snippet

Priority

Indictes priority of data message.

int Priority { get; set; }

int

Adds an argument to the data message.

Adds a column to the data message.

nIndex int

object

getRawColumn(int)

Returns the Raw column info. For Objects it is a array of bytes conforming to the IPersist Stream format.

object getRawColumn(int nIndex)

Parameters

nIndex int

Returns

object

Removes an argument from the data message.
